name: @thunderid/wayfinder-sample
description: Wayfinder travel sample demonstrating an AI agent with its own ThunderID-managed identity.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --workspace backend run dev" "npm --workspace smtp-server run dev" "npm --workspace ai-agent run dev" "npm --workspace frontend run dev" "npm --workspace lounge run dev"
scripts.dev:b2c: concurrently "npm --workspace backend run dev" "npm --workspace smtp-server run dev" "npm --workspace frontend run dev" "npm --workspace lounge run dev"
